records.m_Talk_ENG: This is the entrance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is the entrance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is the entrance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's been a long time since I went inside the garden, so I'm really nervous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's been a long time since I went inside the garden, so I'm really nervous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been a long time since I went inside the garden, so I'm really nervous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even finding the entrance is hard. I'd get lost immediately if I went in there alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even finding the entrance is hard. I'd get lost immediately if I went in there alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even finding the entrance is hard. I'd get lost immediately if I went in there alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mother made it like a maze on purpose. So that those mean C.O.s could not escape.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mother made it like a maze on purpose. So that those mean C.O.s could not escape.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mother made it like a maze on purpose. So that those mean C.O.s could not escape.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The C.O.s are coming out from in there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The C.O.s are coming out from in there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The C.O.s are coming out from in there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They used to appear frequently near our house, but ever since Mother left to stop them, the area around the house became safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They used to appear frequently near our house, but ever since Mother left to stop them, the area around the house became safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They used to appear frequently near our house, but ever since Mother left to stop them, the area around the house became safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all thanks to her fighting them off in the inner yard. Like an Administration hero.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all thanks to her fighting them off in the inner yard. Like an Administration hero.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all thanks to her fighting them off in the inner yard. Like an Administration hero.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is my first time coming here with someone else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is my first time coming here with someone else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is my first time coming here with someone else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think? Isn't it beautiful?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think? Isn't it beautiful?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think? Isn't it beautiful?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's full of plants. Much like Pavlin's taste.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's full of plants. Much like Pavlin's taste.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's full of plants. Much like Pavlin's taste.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing how so many plants have grown, she was also aware that time was flowing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing how so many plants have grown, she was also aware that time was flowing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing how so many plants have grown, she was also aware that time was flowing.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Then, for her child, Pavlin must
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Then, for her child, Pavlin must
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Then, for her child, Pavlin must
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? That bush...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? That bush...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? That bush...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: These are raspberries that Mother and I planted. They also bore fruit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: These are raspberries that Mother and I planted. They also bore fruit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: These are raspberries that Mother and I planted. They also bore fruit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here! Let's eat them together!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here! Let's eat them together!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here! Let's eat them together!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're going to try to grow fruit in a Corrupted Area?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're going to try to grow fruit in a Corrupted Area?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're going to try to grow fruit in a Corrupted Area?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doesn't it sound wonderful?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doesn't it sound wonderful?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't it sound wonderful?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's nice to see lush greenery covering the tarnished lands, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's nice to see lush greenery covering the tarnished lands, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's nice to see lush greenery covering the tarnished lands, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the Corruption ray gets any stronger than now, they'll all wither away. It could be all for nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the Corruption ray gets any stronger than now, they'll all wither away. It could be all for nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the Corruption ray gets any stronger than now, they'll all wither away. It could be all for nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That may be true, but all forests start out with a single blade of grass.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That may be true, but all forests start out with a single blade of grass.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That may be true, but all forests start out with a single blade of grass.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And when I imagine this place becoming a green pasture in the future, I don't think it'll be all for nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And when I imagine this place becoming a green pasture in the future, I don't think it'll be all for nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And when I imagine this place becoming a green pasture in the future, I don't think it'll be all for nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excellent attitude, Pavlin!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excellent attitude, Pavlin!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excellent attitude, Pavlin!

records.m_Talk_ENG: To love your world in your own way and work hard for it! It is one of the most important attributes an Antagonist who protects the world should have!
records.m_Talk_DEU: To love your world in your own way and work hard for it! It is one of the most important attributes an Antagonist who protects the world should have!
records.m_Talk_FRA: To love your world in your own way and work hard for it! It is one of the most important attributes an Antagonist who protects the world should have!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Ma'am! You're not supposed to pick them now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Ma'am! You're not supposed to pick them now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Ma'am! You're not supposed to pick them now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh... What a bitter raspberry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... What a bitter raspberry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh... What a bitter raspberry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if this is the taste of hope blooming in these barren lands...! I'll gladly enjoy it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if this is the taste of hope blooming in these barren lands...! I'll gladly enjoy it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if this is the taste of hope blooming in these barren lands...! I'll gladly enjoy it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not ripe yet, so, of course it's bitter, Aura.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not ripe yet, so, of course it's bitter, Aura.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not ripe yet, so, of course it's bitter, Aura.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You really have no patience.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You really have no patience.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You really have no patience.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: How is it, Parry?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How is it, Parry?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How is it, Parry?

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The raspberry. Is it sweet?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The raspberry. Is it sweet?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The raspberry. Is it sweet?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yeah.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yeah.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yeah.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can't taste any bitterness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can't taste any bitterness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can't taste any bitterness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, you don't! It was planted on the soil that Mother chose.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, you don't! It was planted on the soil that Mother chose.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, you don't! It was planted on the soil that Mother chose.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She said that raspberries grow best in places with little sunlight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She said that raspberries grow best in places with little sunlight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She said that raspberries grow best in places with little sunlight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... Come to think of it, this won't surprise you at all, Parry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... Come to think of it, this won't surprise you at all, Parry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... Come to think of it, this won't surprise you at all, Parry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because in the outside world where the Administration is, there are bigger forests, more colorful flowers, and even more delicious fruits than here, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because in the outside world where the Administration is, there are bigger forests, more colorful flowers, and even more delicious fruits than here, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because in the outside world where the Administration is, there are bigger forests, more colorful flowers, and even more delicious fruits than here, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure there are thousands of berries that are tastier than raspberries, right? If I may ask, did you bring any seeds of them with you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure there are thousands of berries that are tastier than raspberries, right? If I may ask, did you bring any seeds of them with you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure there are thousands of berries that are tastier than raspberries, right? If I may ask, did you bring any seeds of them with you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey, I don't know why your mother said those things to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey, I don't know why your mother said those things to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey, I don't know why your mother said those things to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
But the world outside the garden has already
8g

But the world outside the garden has already
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
But the world outside the garden has already
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Be careful, Parry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Be careful, Parry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Be careful, Parry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh?! There are C.O.s in here as well?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh?! There are C.O.s in here as well?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh?! There are C.O.s in here as well?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Solovey! Let's turn back and find another way!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Solovey! Let's turn back and find another way!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Solovey! Let's turn back and find another way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can fight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can fight!
